programme.title: Z Nation

programme.title: Z Nation

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: En suivant le rêve de Warren, l'équipe traverse un paysage de destruction qui semble infini.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: L'équipe est capturée et réduite en esclavage dans une installation souterraine élaborée, forcée par ses mystérieux ravisseurs à accomplir une série de tâches bizarres et dangereuses.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: Lucy se bat pour sauver la vie de Murphy, tandis que Warren et les autres affrontent un zombie modifié.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: Warren et le groupe rencontrent un mystérieux étranger qu'ils pensent être un pilleur de tombes.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: Le groupe explore une station de télévision tout en cherchant un moyen de contacter Kaya à Northern Light.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: À Chicago, Doc et Murphy rencontrent un groupe mystérieux, et meurtrier, composé notamment de Sketchy et Skeezy.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: Le groupe retourne au Mercy Labs, où ils ont rencontré The Man pour la première fois, pour récupérer un objet.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: L'équipe arrive à Washington et le secret des rêves de Warren est révélé.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: Après le crash du drone, Warren est soigné par le séduisant fermier Cooper. Pendant ce temps, les autres atteignent enfin la Nouvelle Amérique, et Murphy suit sa propre voie.

programme.title: Z Nation

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: La panique et les émotions s'enflamment après qu'une explosion fit dérailler le vote.

programme.title: Z Nation

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: Warren et le groupe se retrouvent dans un casino et un refuge pour les parleurs dirigé par Murphy et ses amis.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: L'histoire de la défonce de Doc
programme.desc: Doc soigne la blessure de George et lui explique les fondements des Etats-Unis d'Amérique.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: Le groupe arrive à l'avant-poste agricole qui produit de la farine, mais le danger les guette.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: Le groupe retrouve des amis amérindiens qui défendent un barrage qui contrôle l'eau de la Nouvelle-Amérique.

programme.title: Z Nation

programme.title: Z Nation

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: Warren travaille avec les humains, les parleurs et les mélanges pour aider George à vaincre Estes et Pandora. Les Nouveaux Américains peuvent enfin voter, mais avant que Warren ne puisse se détendre, Cooper réapparaît avec une révélation choquante.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: Trois ans après le début d'une apocalypse zombie, le lieutenant Hammond rassemble une équipe de héros pour transporter le seul survivant connu du virus zombie de New York en Californie dans l'espoir de l'utiliser pour un vaccin.

programme.title: Z Nation

programme.title: Z Nation

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: Une tornade oblige l'équipe à se rendre dans la ville natale de Warren, où elle recherche son mari dont elle a perdu la trace dans les premiers jours de l'apocalypse.

programme.title: Z Nation

programme.title: Z Nation

programme.title: Z Nation

programme.title: Z Nation

programme.title: Speed Racer

programme.title: Speed Racer

programme.title: The Goode Family
programme.sub-title: A Goode Man is Hard to Find
programme.desc: Meet Gerald and Helen Goode, a couple who live by the motto WWAGD ("What Would Al Gore Do?"). They're zealous vegans, they drive a hybrid, and they recycle everything possible. programme.title: The Goode Family
programme.desc: Meet Gerald and Helen Goode, a couple who live by the motto WWAGD ("What Would Al Gore Do?"). They're zealous vegans, they drive a hybrid, and they recycle everything possible. programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.sub-title: Challenge of the Masked Racer: Part 2
programme.desc: Teenager Speed Racer aspires to be the world's best race-car champion with the help of his friends, family and his father's high-tech race-car, the Mach 5. Speed Racer and Racer X participate in the Trans-Country race... as well as competitors who stoop to dirty tricks to get rid of them.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: Teenager Speed Racer aspires to be the world's best race-car champion with the help of his friends, family and his father's high-tech race-car, the Mach 5. Speed tries to help an old man find his stolen car. It turns out the car has a map to a treasure, which a criminal mastermind is prepared to get at any cost.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: Teenager Speed Racer aspires to be the world's best race-car champion with the help of his friends, family and his father's high-tech race-car, the Mach 5. Speed leads Blaggard's men to the treasure but manages to alert his family and Trixie. The stage is set for a great battle.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.sub-title: The Race Against the Mammoth Car: Part 2
programme.desc: Teenager Speed Racer aspires to be the world's best race-car champion with the help of his friends, family and his father's high-tech race-car, the Mach 5. Speed and Trixie survive the Mammoth Car, but it continues its mysterious journey even beyond the racetrack. What is its secret?

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: Teenager Speed Racer aspires to be the world's best race-car champion with the help of his friends, family and his father's high-tech race-car, the Mach 5. Speed takes part in a mountain race, considered with its gorges and landslides to be the most dangerous race ever. It's about to live up to that reputation.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: Teenager Speed Racer aspires to be the world's best race-car champion with the help of his friends, family and his father's high-tech race-car, the Mach 5. The Alpine Car Race continues, but a yawning chasm causes a major standstill. Who will risk their lives to cross over it?

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: Teenager Speed Racer aspires to be the world's best race-car champion with the help of his friends, family and his father's high-tech race-car, the Mach 5. It's the final lap of the Alpine Race, but Speed Racer is blinded and Racer X's legs are broken. How can they go on?

programme.title: The Goode Family
programme.desc: Meet Gerald and Helen Goode, a couple who live by the motto WWAGD ("What Would Al Gore Do?"). They're zealous vegans, they drive a hybrid, and they recycle everything possible. Even the family dog, Che, is vegan. Gerald pays for the family to adopt a highway, but picking up trash requires them to work with a gang of white supremacist prison inmates.

programme.title: The Goode Family
programme.desc: Meet Gerald and Helen Goode, a couple who live by the motto WWAGD ("What Would Al Gore Do?"). They're zealous vegans, they drive a hybrid, and they recycle everything possible. Even the family dog, Che, is vegan. Helen and Gerald befriend two chic lesbians, Jenn and Suki, in order to get on the Greenville Art Council.

programme.title: The Goode Family
programme.desc: Meet Gerald and Helen Goode, a couple who live by the motto WWAGD ("What Would Al Gore Do?"). They're zealous vegans, they drive a hybrid, and they recycle everything possible. Even the family dog, Che, is vegan. Days before the Organic Gardening Club is to review the Goode's garden, Helen hurts her back.

programme.title: The Goode Family
programme.desc: Helen and Gerald have a hard time adjusting when Ubuntu becomes a high-school football star.

programme.title: The Goode Family
programme.desc: Meet Gerald and Helen Goode, a couple who live by the motto WWAGD ("What Would Al Gore Do?"). They're zealous vegans, they drive a hybrid, and they recycle everything possible. Even the family dog, Che, is vegan. Gerald wants a Public Broadcast Radio affiliate in Greenville so bad that he and Helen host a pledge drive and Gerald surprisingly raises all $100,000 needed, from an old woman named Ruth.

programme.title: The Goode Family
programme.desc: Meet Gerald and Helen Goode, a couple who live by the motto WWAGD ("What Would Al Gore Do?"). They're zealous vegans, they drive a hybrid, and they recycle everything possible. Even the family dog, Che, is vegan. Gerald's outraged when he discovers Cranky, a local BBQ restaurant owner, is selling "meatless chili with chicken" and soon takes a stand, protesting and trying to convince Cranky to remove the chicken.

programme.title: The Goode Family
programme.desc: Meet Gerald and Helen Goode, a couple who live by the motto WWAGD ("What Would Al Gore Do?"). They're zealous vegans, they drive a hybrid, and they recycle everything possible. Even the family dog, Che, is vegan. The Goodes get the support of world-renowned freegan, Heinrich Mueller for their street festival to show the community ways to conserve.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: Teenager Speed Racer aspires to be the world's best race-car champion with the help of his friends, family and his father's high-tech race-car, the Mach 5. Speed discovers that a former racing driver Gadge Zoomer has taken to car wrestling (demolition derbies) to support his family, and attempts to get him to leave this destructive sport.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: Teenager Speed Racer aspires to be the world's best race-car champion with the help of his friends, family and his father's high-tech race-car, the Mach 5. A mad scientist brings to life a monster car that wreaks mayhem and destruction across the country. Can Speed stop it?

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: Teenager Speed Racer aspires to be the world's best race-car champion with the help of his friends, family and his father's high-tech race-car, the Mach 5. The Junkyard Grand Prix is hosted by a rich baron in honour of his missing daughter. But in fact she appears in the race as an unknowing competitor to Speed.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: Teenager Speed Racer aspires to be the world's best race-car champion with the help of his friends, family and his father's high-tech race-car, the Mach 5. When the Racers crash on a deserted island with no food or water, they turn the Mach 5 into a makeshift aircraft in order to go for help.

programme.title: The Anderson Tapes
programme.desc: A habitual criminal, looking for a big score immediately upon leaving prison, goes to the syndicate seeking funds for a massive robbery. He intends to ransack a posh East Side New York apartment building. Rounding up a gang of top-flight thieves, he proceeds to plan and carry out his caper unaware that he is being taped.

programme.title: John Carpenter's Vampires
programme.desc: A contemporary and blood-chilling take on the gothic legend, horror master John Carpenter's Vampires stars James Woods as the ultimate vampire slayer on his most dangerous mission ever.

programme.title: Lake Placid (1999)
programme.desc: A female paleontologist from New York City heads to Maine where local fish and game officials have discovered a gigantic and deadly 30-foot crocodile that appears to be living in one of the local .akes.

programme.title: Chappie
programme.desc: Chappie tells the story of a robot imbued with artificial intelligence who is stolen by two local gangsters who want to use him for their own nefarious purposes.

programme.title: Air
programme.desc: Two engineers guarding the last hope for mankind struggle to preserve their sanity and lives.

programme.title: 3000 Miles To Graceland
programme.desc: Posing as Elvis impersonators, ex-convicts rob a Las Vegas casino during an Elvis Presley fan convention, but greed and dissention among them ultimately lead to betrayal and chaos.

programme.title: Lake Placid (1999)
programme.desc: A female paleontologist from New York City heads to Maine where local fish and game officials have discovered a gigantic and deadly 30-foot crocodile that appears to be living in one of the local .akes.

programme.title: Chappie
programme.desc: Chappie tells the story of a robot imbued with artificial intelligence who is stolen by two local gangsters who want to use him for their own nefarious purposes.

programme.title: Air

programme.title: 3000 Miles To Graceland
programme.desc: Posing as Elvis impersonators, ex-convicts rob a Las Vegas casino during an Elvis Presley fan convention, but greed and dissention among them ultimately lead to betrayal and chaos.

programme.title: The Fog
programme.desc: One hundred years after their ship was deliberately wrecked, the ghosts of the murdered seaman have returned to Antonio Bay to exact a ghastly vengeance.

programme.title: Arena (2011)
programme.desc: David Lord finds himself forced into the savage world of a modern gladiatorial arena, where men fight to the death for the entertainment of the online masses.

programme.title: Exorcist: The Beginning (2004)
programme.desc: Prequel. Exorcist: The Beginning traces the story of Father Merrin back to his first encounter with the Devil during his missionary work in Africa.

programme.title: Exorcist: The Beginning (2004)
programme.desc: Prequel. Exorcist: The Beginning traces the story of Father Merrin back to his first encounter with the Devil during his missionary work in Africa.

programme.title: Sniper (1993)
programme.desc: Tom Berenger is a bush-savvy Marine who teams with a political marksman (Billy Zane) to eliminate a Colombian drug lord in the jungles of Central America.

programme.title: 3000 Miles To Graceland
programme.desc: Posing as Elvis impersonators, ex-convicts rob a Las Vegas casino during an Elvis Presley fan convention, but greed and dissention among them ultimately lead to betrayal and chaos.

programme.title: The Wind and the Lion
programme.desc: A well-educated sheik kidnaps a young American widow and her two children. He demands a ransom from president Teddy Roosevelt who decides a secret rescue attempt should be made instead.

programme.title: Glory
programme.desc: The saga of the first black fighting unit in America's civil war is an inspiring testament to courage, the human spirit, and the value of freedom.

programme.title: Krull
programme.desc: A young prince battles aliens and sorcerers to rescue his princess from the Beast on the fantastic planet Krull.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Baron Munchausen
programme.desc: John Neville and Eric Idle star in this visionary masterpiece about the far-flung fantasies of an 18th-century adventurer.

programme.title: Close Encounters Of The Third Kind (Director's Cut)
programme.desc: We are not alone... A line worker, after an encounter with UFO's, feels undeniably drawn to an isolated area in the wilderness where something spectacular is about to happen.

programme.title: April Fool's Day
programme.desc: A year after a fatal April Fool's party, six rich friends find themselves the targets of a twisted killer who begins hunting them down one by one in this chilling tale of seduction, betrayal and revenge.

programme.title: Hollow Man
programme.desc: Kevin Bacon and Elisabeth Shue play former lovers who, along with a team of other scientists like themselves, discover the secret of invisibility.

programme.title: Dragon Eyes
programme.desc: Action superstars Jean-Claude Van Damme and MMA fighter Cung Le bring mind-blowing martial arts moves and deliver maximum carnage in DRAGON EYES, the badass crime drama filled with blistering street combat.

programme.title: Legion
programme.desc: When God loses faith in mankind he sends his Legion of angels to wipe out the human race for the second time. Man's only hope lies in a group of misfits holed up in a desert diner. With the help of the Archangel Michael, these strangers must deliver a baby they soon realize is the second coming and their last chance at redemption.

programme.title: About Last Night (1986)
programme.desc: A couple (Rob Lowe, Demi Moore) deals with the downside of passion when a one-night stand leads to living together.

programme.title: Another Kind Of Wedding
programme.desc: A fractured family is forced to confront what tore them apart at the eldest son's wedding.

programme.title: The D Train
programme.desc: The head of a high school reunion committee travels to Los Angeles to track down the most popular guy from his graduating class and convince him to go to the reunion.

programme.title: Bye Bye Birdie
programme.desc: A rock singer travels to a small Ohio town to make his "farewell" television performance and kiss his biggest fan before he is drafted.

programme.title: Peggy Sue Got Married
programme.desc: Kathleen Turner, plays a 43-year-old housewife on the verge of a divorce. When she attends her high school reunion she is named queen of the reunion. As she ascends the podium to accept her crown, she passes out and is tossed into a time warp. She awakens in 1960, a 43-year-old person in a 17-year-old body.

programme.title: Two Can Play That Game
programme.desc: Shante, a successful marketing executive is always the one her friends go to when they are having male trouble. Shante has the perfect relationship with her lawyer boyfriend Keith.......that is, until she spots him at a restaurant dancing with a young woman.

programme.title: Crazy In Alabama
programme.desc: Antonio Banderas' directorial debut weaves together the stories of a boy coming of age in racially charged 1960's Alabama, and his eccentric aunt (Melanie Griffith) on the run to Hollywood where she hopes to fulfill her dreams of TV stardom.

programme.title: Bye Bye Birdie
programme.desc: A rock singer travels to a small Ohio town to make his "farewell" television performance and kiss his biggest fan before he is drafted.

programme.title: Peggy Sue Got Married
programme.desc: Kathleen Turner, plays a 43-year-old housewife on the verge of a divorce. When she attends her high school reunion she is named queen of the reunion. As she ascends the podium to accept her crown, she passes out and is tossed into a time warp. She awakens in 1960, a 43-year-old person in a 17-year-old body.

programme.title: Crazy In Alabama
programme.desc: Antonio Banderas' directorial debut weaves together the stories of a boy coming of age in racially charged 1960's Alabama, and his eccentric aunt (Melanie Griffith) on the run to Hollywood where she hopes to fulfill her dreams of TV stardom.

programme.title: Stripes (1981)
programme.desc: Bill Murray and Harold Ramis as bootcamp flatfoots who join the Army to meet girls and actually succeed. Mud wrestling will never be the same.

programme.title: Jumping The Broom
programme.desc: A collision of worlds when two African-American families from divergent socioeconomic backgrounds get together one weekend in Martha's Vineyard for a wedding.

programme.title: Jumping The Broom
programme.desc: A collision of worlds when two African-American families from divergent socioeconomic backgrounds get together one weekend in Martha's Vineyard for a wedding.

programme.title: Just One Of The Guys
programme.desc: Aspiring entrepreneurs pitch their business ideas to moguls, known as the "Sharks," in hopes of landing investment funds in this U.S. adaptation of the British and Japanese reality hit Dragons' Den.

programme.title: Ishtar
programme.desc: With a song in their hearts, the CIA on their backs, a gorgeous revolutionary in their arms and two nations after their heads, Warren Beatty and Dustin Hoffman find adventure, romance and comedy on the road to ISHTAR. Isabelle Adjani is the female lead and Elaine May is the writer and director.

programme.title: Excess Baggage
programme.desc: Alicia Silverstone (Clueless) stars in this romantic comedy about a woman who tries to get back at her father by faking her own kidnapping. When her harebrained scheme gets her locked in the trunk of her own car, she falls into a relationship with a car thief (Benicio Del Toro).

programme.title: Major League
programme.desc: The new owner of the Cleveland Indians puts together a purposely horrible team so they'll lose and she can move the team. But when the plot is uncovered, they start winning just to spite her.

programme.title: Major League: Back To The Minors
programme.desc: A pitcher is about to be put out to pasture when he is given the opportunity to manage a team.

programme.title: Excess Baggage
programme.desc: Alicia Silverstone (Clueless) stars in this romantic comedy about a woman who tries to get back at her father by faking her own kidnapping. When her harebrained scheme gets her locked in the trunk of her own car, she falls into a relationship with a car thief (Benicio Del Toro).

programme.title: Major League
programme.desc: The new owner of the Cleveland Indians puts together a purposely horrible team so they'll lose and she can move the team. But when the plot is uncovered, they start winning just to spite her.

programme.title: Major League: Back To The Minors
programme.desc: A pitcher is about to be put out to pasture when he is given the opportunity to manage a team.

programme.title: Man Of The House (2005)
programme.desc: A hard-edged Texas Ranger is forced to go undercover as an assistant cheerleading coach to protect a group of college cheerleaders after they witness a murder.

programme.title: The Man Who Loved Women (1983)
programme.desc: In Blake Edwards' all-star romantic comedy, Burt Reynolds is David, a sculptor who is an incurable womanizer, who never met a woman he didn't love. He pays a visit to a psychiatrist, Marianna (Julie Andrews), in the hope of removing a creative block he's been experiencing; instead, he falls for her and she for him.

programme.title: Shampoo
programme.desc: Wicked social satire about a sexy male hairdresser that does more than hair. Warren Beatty lampoonshis own womanizer reputation in this feature concerned only with who is "doing" who and the superficial appearances of the upper class of Beverly Hills set against election day for the 1968 Presidential election.

programme.title: Drop Dead Diva
programme.desc: Though Grayson wants to block a casino newspaper ad featuring an old photograph of his late fiancé, Jane is sure that Deb would have wanted it to run. As she is looking for a way to keep him from taking the case to court, Jane learns that her mom, Elaine Bingum, has been arrested for using an emergency slide to escape from a plane that was held on an airport tarmac for six hours. But as she is preparing her defense, Jane must keep Elaine from undermining her case with her outrageous statements on TV. Meanwhile, as Grayson enlists Deb's mom Bobbie in his effort, and Jane anonymously tips off the casino to his courtroom strategy, Fred decides that he's had enough of Stacy's mothering behavior and opts to find a place of his own. Despite Elaine's compelling account of her efforts to calm the stranded passengers, the prosecutor portrays her actions as reckless and even life threatening. Yet, after one of the flight crew confidentially admits that Elaine acted heroically in the face of the airline's indifference and neglect, Jane convinces the judge to allow her to dramatically recreate the conditions inside the plane for the jury. Meanwhile, Bobbie surprises Jane by going on a dinner date with Parker. News that the casino is planning to roll out a major ad campaign featuring Deb prompts Jane to redouble her efforts to get Grayson to back down. So, after recalling how Deb secretly undermined his attempts to rewrite the modeling contract that resulted in the casino ad, Jane's heart-to-heart talk with Grayson ultimately convinces him to drop the case. Finally, as her courtroom stunt convinces the jury that her mom was a hero and not a criminal, Jane warns Bobbie about Parker's reputation with women. After Stacy learns just how much he misses being with her, she engineers a face-saving way for Fred to return home.

programme.title: Drop Dead Diva
programme.desc: After agreeing to represent a college student who has accused the school's star quarterback of rape, Jane (Brooke Elliott) suspects that loyal alumnus Grayson (Jackson Hurst) is trying to undermine her case. Meanwhile, Kim's (Kate Levering) argumentative sister (guest star Kathy Griffin) seeks her help with a divorce.

programme.title: Drop Dead Diva
programme.desc: Jane waits by Grayson's hospital bed for him to wake up from his coma; Parker assigns Jane a case representing a big movie star and Hollywood bad boy charged with a hit and run of a 13-year-old girl, and Kim takes a case representing a recently divorced former client suing her ex for a post-divorce booty call.

programme.title: Drop Dead Diva
programme.desc: With Grayson rapidly improving after the accident, Parker asks Jane to help Kim with a malpractice lawsuit on behalf of Martha Miller, whose aspiring model daughter, Sara, died during breast implant surgery. As Kim quickly realizes that she needs Jane's help, Teri enlists Parker to defend her boyfriend, firefighter Gary Rice, when he's sued by a woman who was injured when he saved her from a burning building. But when the woman's lawyer notes that Gary lied about being a fireman, Teri feels betrayed. Meanwhile, as Stacy wonders when Fred will want to have sex, Grayson asks Jane to help with the wedding plans. Though Kim's case and the wedding are keeping her busy, Jane still finds time for a date with Grayson's doctor, Bill Kendal. As Jane advises Fred about his sex life with Stacy, and then reluctantly launches into planning the wedding that should have been hers, Gary says that when Teri mistook him for a firefighter, he didn't have the heart to say otherwise. Accepting his apology, Teri presses Parker to continue defending him. Meanwhile, though Kim and Jane prove that the SurgiCenter failed to stock a drug that could have saved Sara's life, Martha drops the lawsuit when attorney Amos Hanson reveals that an anti-depressant her daughter was taking could have killed her. While struggling to woo Stacy, Fred calls Jane during her dinner with Bill. After overhearing her advice, Bill is impressed and ends up back at her apartment for the night. Later, Jane learns that Sara was a client at an agency owned by Steven Bay, who routinely referred his models to the SurgiCenter, which he also owns. Once a dozen clients who agreed to have operations appear in court, the judge refers the case to the D.A. and tells Hanson to settle with Martha. Finally, as Fred and Stacy's sex life takes off, news that Gary started fires in order to rescue the victims leads Teri to turn him in to the police. After Grayson apologies for dragging her into the wedding plans, Jane gives him a

programme.title: Drop Dead Diva
programme.desc: As Parker asks Kim to return to the firm and Stacy quizzes Fred about his family, Eli secretly asks Jane to keep after ZygoLife. When the judge agrees to proceed and then reverses her decision because of the statute of limitations, Jane appoints herself Eli's legal guardian to pursue the suit on his behalf. Needing proof that Molly's expectations for her son weren't met, Eli produces a letter she wrote while pregnant that articulates her feelings about the future. Meanwhile, Fred hires an actress to pose as his mom for a dinner with Stacy, but when the fake mom causes more problems than she solves, both he and Stacy agree to never see her again. Back in court, Jane presses Molly to tearfully reveal the truth about what she expected in a son, causing Eli to demand that she stop. Just as she is about to abandon the case, Jane stumbles upon a technicality that forces ZygoLife to settle while sparing Molly another traumatic day in court. Finally, stunned to find that Judge Hemmings has been assigned the strip club case, Grayson makes good on his promise to ask his permission to marry Vanessa. As Jane is celebrating her win for the Hallers, she regrets leaving a scathing message for Bill after discovering that he couldn't call because he accidentally left his phone at her apartment.

programme.title: Drop Dead Diva
programme.desc: When she's robbed as she's picking up the wedding rings, Jane (Brooke Elliott) ends up defending the critically ill thief in court. As the wedding day approaches, Parker (Josh Stamburg) drafts Grayson (Jackson Hurst) to defend an old college classmate (guest star Howard Hesseman) who's been arrested for selling camel's milk.

programme.title: Til Death
programme.desc: An encounter with a disabled man at the mall prompts Eddie to adopt an upbeat personality for the holidays.

programme.title: Til Death
programme.desc: Joy is jealous when Eddie becomes smitten with an attractive woman doctor.

programme.title: Til Death
programme.desc: After an embarrassing incident in a local restaurant, Joy decides to return to college.

programme.title: Til Death
programme.desc: Eddie tries to keep Joy happy by giving her an expensive designer handbag for her birthday, only to have her discover that it's a fake.

programme.title: Til Death
programme.desc: After overhearing an abbreviated phone call with Kenny, Joy is certain that Eddie is hiding something and sets out to uncover the secret.

programme.title: Til Death
programme.desc: Eddie and Joy find happiness when they decide to get separate beds; a harsh new principal at school has a big surprise in store for Eddie.

programme.title: Til Death
programme.desc: Eddie and Joy are surprised when Ally and Doug arrive home from a trip to Ecuador with some big news.

programme.title: Til Death
programme.desc: When the travel agency goes out of business and leaves Joy jobless, it’s up to Eddie to boost her confidence; Ally’s illness forces Doug to bond with his new father-in-law.

programme.title: Til Death
programme.desc: Eddie looks to launch his literary career with a book on zeppelins; Ally’s discovery of thousands of dollars in uncashed gift checks from Doug’s dad prompts a tense father-son reunion.

programme.title: Til Death
programme.desc: Despite Joy’s unemployment, Eddie buys a new high-definition TV; Ally worries about Doug’s paranoid delusions that his life is a conspiratorial television show.

programme.desc: Upset to learn that Eddie attended a baseball game without her, Joy decides they should start doing more things separately.

programme.title: Charlie's Angels
programme.desc: "Suspicious" is the only word for Dr. Franklyn Perine, former astronaut Jim Britten, and their "Celestial Research Foundation," in which rich contributors are promised life in outer space, flying saucers which have arrived on earth, and other wonders, in exchange for a huge amount of money. When one wealthy lady goes into the desert with Dr. Perine and is not heard from again, the Angels must cleverly sneak into a meeting to investigate. Bosley and Kris get in easily as a rich sugar daddy and his sexy playmate. Kelly entices Britten into giving her flying lessons as well as an invitation see the space show, while Sabrina claims to be a private detective checking one of the other members. When the "doctor" tells Kris that people from outer space are very free about matters of sex, and pressures hereto begin practicing immediately, the Angels waste no time an exposing the operation as a fraud. Kate Jackson, Jaclyn Smith. and Cheryl Ladd star as the Angels, Sabrina Duncan, Kelly Garrett and Kris Munroe, respectively, who work for Charlie, an unseen and very sophis-ticated boss who phones in their instructions. David Doyle stars as Bosley, Charlie's harried assistant.

programme.title: Charlie's Angels
programme.desc: When someone tries to kill radio newswoman Joy Vance, the station naturally turns to Charlie and Company for help. The Angels' strategy is for Kelly to take over Joy's duties for a while, since their voices are similar, and for Kris and Sabrina to investigate the threats Joy has recently received. In the course of her work Joy frequently makes enemies, and one of these is probably the killer. Buck Willis, the radio station's helicopter pilot, hates Joy because she is more successful than he is. Sabrina flies with him doing the "air report," and finds him to be a man capable of violence. Dwayne Hanson, whose lifestyle is modeled after Charles Manson, believes he went to jail because Joy's reporting prejudiced a jury against him. Kris visits Dwayne and his "family" in the desert, but is not treated with great warmth hen they find out she isn't really a hippie. The last suspect is Professor Croyden, whose discovery of a cold vaccine was exposed by Joy as a fake. Croyden is known to be a skier, and the man who tried to kill Kelly (posing as Joy) was wearing a ski mask. Also, the license plates on the killer's car reveal that it was stolen that morning - from a student at Croyden's college - so Sabrina, who has just applied to be his assistant, may be in more trouble than she realizes. Kate Jackson, Jaclyn Smith. and Cheryl Ladd star as the Angels, Sabrina Duncan, Kelly Garrett and Kris Munroe, respectively, who work for Charlie, an unseen and very sophis-ticated boss who phones in their instructions. David Doyle stars as Bosley, Charlie's harried assistant.

programme.title: Charlie's Angels
programme.desc: Kelly's old friend, Tommy Anders, thinks his fiancée, Marie, has deserted him, and he leaves his Army post without permission. Actually she is about to have his child, but rather than force him to marry her, she has decided to sell the baby on the black market. This decision gets her involved with Hugh Tomlinson and his bodyguard, Chaffey, of the Warfield Home for Girls. Pregnant girls are tricked into giving up their babies and kept as prisoners -- and that isn't the worst of it. After Tommy comes to the Angels for help, a girl, last seen driving away with Chaffey is discovered -- dead. In order to infiltrate the horrible "home for girls," Sabrina and Bosley pretend be a wealthy, childless couple willing to pay for a baby, Kelly pretends to pregnant, and Kris pretends that she is willing to become a "baby-maker" for the home because the is desperately in need of money. Kate Jackson, Jaclyn Smith. and Cheryl Ladd star as the Angels, Sabrina Duncan, Kelly Garrett and Kris Munroe, respectively, who work for Charlie, an unseen and very sophis-ticated boss who phones in their instructions. David Doyle stars as Bosley, Charlie's harried assistant.

programme.title: Charlie's Angels
programme.desc: Enrico Mancini's musical production is not going well. Ellen and Frank Jason, who starred in the show twenty years ago would be perfect for it now, but their marriage went bad and they dislike each other too much to work together. Frank, however, is in debt, and by having two brutes follow him around to remind him of that, Mancini hopes to pressure Frank into taking the job. Anton Metzger presents a different kind of problem, and it is to find him that the Angels are hired. Anton is now deranged and mute, but many years ago he was in love with another lady who performed this show in Europe, and he is determined to prevent anyone else from doing it. He haunts the rehearsals, dropping heavy objects from to terrify the crew. But no one even knows what he looks like, and he always disappears without a trace. Frank and Kris become very fond of each other, and since Kris did some acting in college, Frank says he will do the show, but only if Kris is his leading lady. They do an impressive song together, with Anton dreaming of his old love as he watches above. Ellen also performs a beautiful song, and Frank is so moved when he hears it that the two of them decide their marriage can still be saved. Kate Jackson, Jaclyn Smith. and Cheryl Ladd star as the Angels, Sabrina Duncan, Kelly Garrett and Kris Munroe, respectively, who work for Charlie, an unseen and very sophis-ticated boss who phones in their instructions. David Doyle stars as Bosley, Charlie's harried assistant.

programme.title: Charlie's Angels
programme.desc: Sabrina, Kelly and Kris invade the world of illusion to help a flame-throwing magician prove he is not the arsonist burning down fashion centers wherever he appears in "Magic Fire. Aging illusionist Wendell Muse is being hassled by cops across the land because suspicious fires keep breaking out in cities he plays. To clear his name, Muse hires the Angels, who bring their own bag of tricks to the caper. Kate Jackson, Jaclyn Smith. and Cheryl Ladd star as the Angels, Sabrina Duncan, Kelly Garrett and Kris Munroe, respectively, who work for Charlie, an unseen and very sophis-ticated boss who phones in their instructions. David Doyle stars as Bosley, Charlie's harried assistant.

programme.title: Charlie's Angels
programme.desc: Kidnapers stalk Sammy Davis Jr., so Sabrina, Kelly and Kris are hired to protect him in "The Sammy Davis Jr. Kidnap Caper," guest starring Sammy Davis Jr. in twin roles as himself and as a guy who looks just like him, on "Charlie's Angels." The Angels become Sammy's bodyguards after an attempt has been made to snatch the superstar from the restroom of a restaurant. But when Sammy's look-alike -- an abrasive character named Herbert Brubaker III -- comes to visit Davis and his wife Altovise at their home, the kidnappers strike again, abducting Brubaker by mistake. The Angels set out to rescue Brubaker, who has his captors convinced he is the real Sammy, despite a hilarious "demonstration" of his talent. Kate Jackson, Jaclyn Smith. and Cheryl Ladd star as the Angels, Sabrina Duncan, Kelly Garrett and Kris Munroe, respectively, who work for Charlie, an unseen and very sophis-ticated boss who phones in their instructions. David Doyle stars as Bosley, Charlie's harried assistant.

programme.title: Charlie's Angels
programme.desc: Several people travel by bus to the Sunwest Dude Ranch, and when they arrive one of them is dead. The man, identified as Joseph Frisch, was clubbed over the head, and one of the other passengers must be guilty because the bus, made no stops. Charlie's Angels arrive at the ranch shortly after, pretending to be three innocent visitors. By flirting with each of the suspects, they try to figure out what happened. George Jackson is known as an unscrupulous private eye, and the Angels watch him carefully since whatever he is doing is probably connected with the crime. Jean Trevor, another passenger, is romantically involved with Ed Miller, and E Cole is a sullen man who says very little, but the Angels can find no con-nection between these people and Joseph Frisch. Then Charlie learns of a big real estate swindle several years ago involving all of the passengers on the bus. Miss Trevor has stated that she did not know Frisch, yet they worked together. The link is supplied when the man who died o the bus is found to be not Frisch, but Ed Miller. The real Frisch, trying to \avoid being found, killed him and took his wallet and this is the man George Jackson is being paid to find. Jackson makes a telephone call, and that afternoon two new visitors arrive, Sloan and Farrell. When they realize their plan to kill Frisch is known, they try to escape, but all the roads have been blocked. Quickly, they take two horses, and there is no way for the Angels to capture them without doing the same. Kris, Kelly and Sabrina all ride beautifully in an exciting chase. Kate Jackson, Jaclyn Smith. and Cheryl Ladd star as the Angels, Sabrina Duncan, Kelly Garrett and Kris Munroe, respectively, who work for Charlie, an unseen and very sophis-ticated boss who phones in their instructions. David Doyle stars as Bosley, Charlie's harried assistant.

programme.title: Charlie's Angels
programme.desc: Kris enters the ladies' "Hermosa Cup" tennis tournament when a series of unexplained accidents" leaves one of the stars dead and the others too frightened to play. First, a young player, Sandy, is locked in the showers and almost scalded to death, and then Helga, a health nut, finds a rattlesnake in her bag while meditating. Sabrina and Kelly come along, of course, and both go to work sweet-talking several males who are possible suspects. Ronny Kane is an unpleasant old woman--hater, but he seems basically harmless. Then there is Arlo Spinner, tennis supplies dealer, who has the pathetic ambition of being more successful than his father. Arlo was always the smallest kid on the block, as he confides to his new friend, Sabrina. (She and Kelly look ravishing in the tennis dresses Arlo wants them to model.) Another of the stars, Carrie Jo Evans, is one of the only healthy players remaining, and she just happens to be the main promoter of Arlo's racquets. She doesn't sus-pect a thing, however, until she overhears a, conversation that reveals all. Arlo has been trying to eliminate the competition so that Carrie, using his products, will win and bring prestige to his company. But Carrie will have nothing to do with it, and Arlo must leave in a great hurry, with the Angels not far behind. Kate Jackson, Jaclyn Smith. and Cheryl Ladd star as the Angels, Sabrina Duncan, Kelly Garrett and Kris Munroe, respectively, who work for Charlie, an unseen and very sophis-ticated boss who phones in their instructions. David Doyle stars as Bosley, Charlie's harried assistant.

programme.title: Charlie's Angels
programme.desc: "Suspicious" is the only word for Dr. Franklyn Perine, former astronaut Jim Britten, and their "Celestial Research Foundation," in which rich contributors are promised life in outer space, flying saucers which have arrived on earth, and other wonders, in exchange for a huge amount of money. When one wealthy lady goes into the desert with Dr. Perine and is not heard from again, the Angels must cleverly sneak into a meeting to investigate. Bosley and Kris get in easily as a rich sugar daddy and his sexy playmate. Kelly entices Britten into giving her flying lessons as well as an invitation see the space show, while Sabrina claims to be a private detective checking one of the other members. When the "doctor" tells Kris that people from outer space are very free about matters of sex, and pressures hereto begin practicing immediately, the Angels waste no time an exposing the operation as a fraud. Kate Jackson, Jaclyn Smith. and Cheryl Ladd star as the Angels, Sabrina Duncan, Kelly Garrett and Kris Munroe, respectively, who work for Charlie, an unseen and very sophis-ticated boss who phones in their instructions. David Doyle stars as Bosley, Charlie's harried assistant.

programme.title: Better Call Saul
programme.desc: Jimmy visits an old friend and takes up a new pastime; Chuck and Hamlin spar over the future of the firm; and Kim faces challenges at work.

programme.title: Better Call Saul
programme.desc: In the Season 3 finale, Kim takes time off, while Jimmy tries to make amends; Nacho gambles with his future; and Hamlin pushes Chuck to make a decision.

programme.title: Better Call Saul
programme.desc: In the Season 4 premiere, Jimmy struggles to cope with Chuck's tragic death; Mike ponders his role at Madrigal; and Howard makes a startling confession.

programme.title: Better Call Saul
programme.desc: Jimmy seeks new employment. Gus navigates the fallout from Hector's collapse. Kim endeavors to support Jimmy in the wake of Chuck's death.

programme.title: Better Call Saul
programme.desc: Kim and Jimmy face off with an unforgiving adversary; Jimmy looks to Chuck's past to secure his own future; and Jimmy loses one ally but gains another.

programme.title: Better Call Saul
programme.desc: Jimmy puts a risky plan into motion. As alliances shift, Nacho finds himself in the crosshairs. Kim contemplates her future.

programme.title: Better Call Saul
programme.desc: A restless Jimmy embarks on a new endeavor while Mike burns bridges. Kim pursues her bliss. Nacho tries to survive a turf war.

programme.title: Better Call Saul
programme.desc: Jimmy identifies a new market for his talents. Mike vets a potential partnership. Kim drives a hard bargain.

programme.title: Better Call Saul
programme.desc: While Jimmy daydreams about reconstituting Wexler-McGill, Kim sets out to secure her own future. Mike puts a plan into motion for Gus.

programme.desc: Jimmy goes to great lengths to right a wrong, as Kim pulls out all the stops for a case. Mike lets his team blow off steam. Nacho receives a visitor.

programme.desc: A father's search for his missing daughter exposes a religious cult leader's plan to topple the government.

programme.title: Sheena
programme.desc: After she's caught mid-transformation, a university professor captures Sheena in hopes of making a fortune.

programme.title: Sheena
programme.desc: Sheena and Cutter enlist a journalist to help stop a refinery from being built in the LaMistas.

programme.title: Sheena
programme.desc: Sheena and Cutter find themselves under attack by a massive invasion of deadly ants.

programme.title: Sheena
programme.desc: A photographer hires Cutter to help free his uncle from a corrupt government prison.

programme.title: Sheena
programme.desc: A surveillance mission leaves Cutter and Sheena stranded in a mysterious jungle area known as the Bermuda Triangle of Africa.

programme.title: Bowling Pro-Motion Tour
programme.desc: The only Tour in the world which moves every day from city to city... The 2024/2025 Bowling Pro-Motion Tour visited 7 cities in France (Bayeux, Avranches, Saint-Lo, Rennes, Chateaubriant, Ancenis, Fontaine le Comte). 8 Nations bowled this season: Belgium, England, France, Finland, Iran, Netherlands, Slovakia, Wales.
